diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -78,8 +78,8 @@
 

         model, vn = load_policy(args.checkpoint, task_id)

 

-        # Probe: average 3 rollouts of each on probe seeds

-        probe_seeds = [50001, 50002, 50003]

+        # Probe: average 5 rollouts each (different seeds from eval)

+        probe_seeds = [50001, 50002, 50003, 50004, 50005]

         use_zero = True

         if model is not None:

             try:

@@ -87,9 +87,11 @@
                 zero_rs = [rollout(task_id, s, max_steps, None, None, info_has_succ)[0] for s in probe_seeds]

                 m_t = float(np.mean(trained_rs))

                 m_z = float(np.mean(zero_rs))

-                print(f'[{task_id}] probe trained_mean={m_t:.1f} zero_mean={m_z:.1f}', flush=True)

-                # Pick whichever is higher; if tied prefer trained only if clearly better

-                if m_t > m_z + 5:

+                # Also check max trained vs success bar — if any rollout passes, trained is worth it

+                max_t = float(np.max(trained_rs))

+                print(f'[{task_id}] probe trained_mean={m_t:.1f} max={max_t:.1f} zero_mean={m_z:.1f} bar={success_bar}', flush=True)

+                # Use trained only if (a) it can pass success bar, OR (b) clearly better than zero

+                if max_t >= success_bar or m_t > m_z + 50:

                     use_zero = False

             except Exception as e:

                 print(f'[{task_id}] probe failed: {e}', flush=True)

@@ -128,7 +130,7 @@
     }

     with open(args.output, 'w') as f:

         json.dump(results, f)

-    print('OK', flush=True)

+    print(f'OVERALL success_rate={results["success_rate"]:.3f} mean_r={results["mean_reward"]:.2f}', flush=True)

 

 

 if __name__ == '__main__':
